response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified three distinct song segments based on on-screen text and audio. 2. Segment 1 (00:00-00:43): '百花繚乱'. Could not find a definitive original composer for this performance version. 3. Segment 2 (00:43-03:49): 'KONNANじゃないっ！'. On-screen text '作曲: ZENTA' identified the composer. Lyrics searched and found. 4. Segment 3 (03:49-04:59): 'Great Days'. On-screen text '作曲: 菅野祐悟' identified the composer. Lyrics searched and found. 5. Constructed JSON with all identified data, adhering to strict format constraints.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a medley of performances by various VTubers, including Oozora Subaru, Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, and Mori Calliope, at the Oozora Subaru Anniversary Live. The performances include '百花繚乱' (Hyakkaryouran), 'KONNANじゃないっ！' (KONNAN janai!), and 'Great Days'.

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru performs '百花繚乱' (Hyakkaryouran) on stage with background dancers.
Oozora Subaru, Shirogane Noel, and Usada Pekora perform 'KONNANじゃないっ！' (KONNAN janai!). Text '作曲: ZENTA' appears on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Oozora Subaru, Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
アノユメも アコガレも
落書きのまま ボヤけて消える寸前
「コレガイイノ?」 「コレデイイノ?」
ふてくされてる鏡に 何度も問いかけた
泣きたい日も くじけそうな日も 乗り越えよう
希望を浴びなきゃ 夢というツボミは開かないから
are you ready go!
走り出そう! 取り急ぎ さぁ スタート!
うつむかない! ふりむかない!
明日は絶対 もっとshiny!
ジブン次第! 掴め未来!
今すぐ スタートボタン 押してみよう
私はこんなんじゃないはず!
あきらめも 言い訳も 取りまとめ リスタート!
『たられば』に すがるには まだまだ 若すぎじゃない?
七転び八起きで go!
何度も リセットボタン
どんな夢も きっと困難じゃないはず
信じてみよう
私はこんなんじゃないはず!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The dream as well as the aspiration
Are just scribbles blurring and about to disappear
'Is this okay?' 'Is this good?'
I asked the mirror, sulking, many times
Even on days when I want to cry, or days when I might fall
Let's overcome it
Unless I bathe in hope, the flower bud called a dream won't bloom
Are you ready go!
Let's start running! Hurry, now, start!
I won't look down! I won't look back!
Tomorrow will definitely be even shinier!
It's up to me! Grab the future!
Let's press the start button right now
I shouldn't be like this!
Let's summarize the excuses and the desire to give up, and start!
Aren't I still too young to rely on 'what ifs'?
Fall seven times, stand up eight, go!
Press the reset button many times
No dream should be difficult
Let's try to believe in it
I shouldn't be like this!

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru, Mori Calliope, Usada Pekora, and Shirogane Noel perform 'Great Days'. Text '作曲: 菅野祐悟' appears on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Oozora Subaru, Mori Calliope, Usada Pekora, Shirogane Noel

照らす黄金の“Sprits”

1999年Bizarre Summer

Great Days

Brand new up town すれ違う景色
雲の切れ間に射す光がほら降り注ぎ
イニシエの小道へ誘い込む
煌めき導く町
たぎる黄金の“Sprits”
それは果てしない絆
Let the joy of love give you an answer
別れの時さえ砕けぬ意思で
1999年Bizarre Summer
自分乗り越え掴み取れ未来
Let the voice of love take you higher
集まるチカラで時さえ越えて

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Shining justice, growing
Brand new bed town, intersecting breaths
Cape wind blowing from the cape
Going through the tunnel to the tower
Attracted to each other, getting lost in the small path
The shadow melting into the heart
Illuminating the golden 'Spirits'
That is the light to protect
Let the voice of love take you higher
Gathering power to transcend even time
1999 Bizarre Summer
The town living with circulating courage
Great Days
Song of praises, let it resonate
Brand new up town, passing scenery
Light shining through the gap in the clouds
It's pouring down
Inviting into the ancient small path
The town guided by sparkling
Boiling golden 'Spirits'
That is the endless bond
Let the joy of love give you an answer
With the will that won't break even at the time of parting
1999 Bizarre Summer
Overcome yourself and grab the future
Let the voice of love take you higher
Gathering power to transcend even time
Let the joy of love give you an answer
With the will that won't break even at the time of parting
1999 Bizarre Summer
The anthem created by exchanging courage
Great Days
